title: Hhen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Hhen |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|That's your ship?''"
"''Yes.''"
"''Are there any other Jedi on board.''"
"''No.''"
"''Very well.|an Aqualish officer and Dorsk 82, before blowing up the ship with Hhen on board|}} '''Hhen''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and flew during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. While attempting to rescue [[Droid/Legends|droids]] from an angry mob on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], Hhen was killed when an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Unidentified Aqualish officer|officer]] blew up the ship in order to trap [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dorsk 82]] and appease the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Dorsk 82, who had been in route to Ando, was killed shortly after. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hhen |es=Hhen }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Pilots]]
